name: MemClaw Context Engine
description: Native context management for OpenClaw with automatic recall, capture, and compaction powered by Cortex Memory

autoStartServices.description: Automatically start Qdrant and cortex-mem-service if not running

autoRecall.description: Enable automatic memory recall during context assembly

autoCapture.description: Enable automatic message capture after each turn

recallWindow.description: Number of recent user turns to construct recall query

recallLimit.description: Maximum number of memories to recall

commitTokenThreshold.description: Token threshold to trigger automatic commit

commitTurnThreshold.description: Turn threshold to trigger automatic commit

recentRawTurnCount.description: Number of recent raw turns to keep in context

llmApiKey.description: LLM API key for memory processing

llmModel.description: LLM model name for memory processing

embeddingApiKey.description: Embedding API key for vector generation

embeddingModel.description: Embedding model name for vector search

serviceUrl.label: Service URL
serviceUrl.description: The HTTP endpoint of your cortex-mem-service instance

autoStartServices.label: Auto-start Services
autoStartServices.description: Automatically start Qdrant and cortex-mem-service when plugin loads

autoRecall.label: Auto Recall
autoRecall.description: Automatically recall relevant memories during context assembly

autoCapture.label: Auto Capture
autoCapture.description: Automatically capture messages after each turn

llmApiKey.label: LLM API Key
llmApiKey.description: API key for LLM service (required for memory processing)

embeddingApiKey.label: Embedding API Key
embeddingApiKey.description: API key for embedding service (required for vector search)
